scope.summary: Constitution rule 14 plus the root cause of the E_TREE_DIRTY close: the evidence scaffold stamped tree_clean from a repo-wide `git status`, which is never clean in a five-agent checkout, so every scaffolded close inherited other agents' mid-edits.
out_of_scope: The four earlier incidents in the same session, carried by the sibling beads under oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.6.
The rust-oracledb half: its AGENTS.md still carries the twelve-rule constitution and none of these mechanisms.

The validator: scripts/validate_evidence.py is unchanged. E_TREE_DIRTY is a correct HARD finding and stays one; what changed is that the boolean it reads is now derived over the bead's claimed paths instead of the whole shared tree.

entry_points.name: python3 scripts/audit_bead_closes.py --template <id> --scope <path>
entry_points.trace: Against this live tree (35-39 foreign dirty paths): unscoped emits tree_clean:false, --scope scripts/build_lease.sh emits tree_clean:true plus a stderr note counting the out-of-scope dirty paths, and --scope on an uncommitted path emits tree_clean:false plus the 'commit them before closing' list. `python3 scripts/audit_bead_closes.py --self-test` PASS and `bash scripts/check_bead_close_evidence.sh` reports 0 hard findings after the change.

entry_points.name: scripts/swarm_discipline.sh evidence-source
entry_points.trace: This document's own source block was produced by `evidence-source --kind close --scope AGENTS.md --scope scripts/swarm_discipline.sh --scope scripts/audit_bead_closes.py --scope .github/workflows/ci.yml`, which printed the note about 35 foreign dirty paths and then {"sha": "32122cb9857684ace414e03ef4a3ca6771dc0183", "tree_clean": true, "branch": "main"}. The selftest asserts that --kind proof refuses a dirty tree (exit 65) while --kind close accepts a clean scope.

limitations: The scoped boolean is honest for a close, whose auditor already checks in-scope paths only. A whole-tree reproducibility proof still needs a genuinely clean tree; evidence-source --kind proof refuses instead of relaxing that, and points at a clean worktree at HEAD.
Existing close documents were not rewritten; the fix is at the generator.
